title: NIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

basic_details.job_title: NIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 32 years (for JRF) as on the closing date of the application. Age relaxation as per GOI norms.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years (for JRF) as on the closing date of the application. Age relaxation as per GOI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E./M.S. (by Research) or equivalent postgraduate degree in Computer Science & Engineering/IT/ECE/ or relevant branch with minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks and with a GATE/NET Qualified. OR B.Tech./B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering/IT/ECE/or relevant branch with a minimum CGPA of 7.5 (on a 10-point scale) and a valid GATE.
qualification.details: M.Tech./M.E./M.S. (by Research) or an equivalent postgraduate degree in Computer Science & Engineering/IT/ECE/ or relevant branch with a minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks and with a GATE/NET Qualified. B.Tech./B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering/IT/ECE/or relevant branch with a minimum CGPA of 7.5 (on a 10-point scale) and a valid GATE. Work/Project development experience in the area of Image Processing, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Deep learning is desirable. Candidates should have a strong background and programming skills in Python.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Delhi JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Tech./M.E./M.S. (by Research) or equivalent postgraduate degree with GATE/NET qualification, or a B.Tech./B.E. with a minimum CGPA of 7.5 and a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the JRF position is not exceeding 32 years as of the application closing date. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of ₹37,000/- per month plus HRA, as per the norms set by the Department of Science and Technology (DST).

faq.question: Q5. How should I apply for the NIT Delhi JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email to [email protected] with the subject line “Application for JRF Position”, along with a filled application form, CV, and self-attested copies of relevant documents.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the JRF position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is for a duration of 3 years, which is coterminous with the project.

faq.question: Q8. Does NIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the JRF role at NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will primarily be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NIT Delhi for more information?
faq.answer: The official website of National Institute of Technology Delhi is where you can find more details about the institute and its ongoing recruitments.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the NIT Delhi JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Tech./M.E./M.S. (by Research) or equivalent postgraduate degree with GATE/NET qualification, or a B.Tech./B.E. with a minimum CGPA of 7.5 and a valid GATE score.

faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email to anuragsg@nitdelhi.ac.in with the subject line “Application for JRF Position”, along with a filled application form, CV, and self-attested copies of relevant documents.

faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
